payload.answer: There isn’t enough information to determine whether Sam’s Goldman role and Sam’s Point72 joining are compatible (e.g., sequential jobs, concurrent roles, or an outdated record). Treat both as separate, time-uncertain affiliation claims until dates or recency are clarified.
